testcase.name: test_update_own_familiar
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_phase4_legado.py:187: in test_update_own_familiar assert r.status_code == 200 E assert 403 == 200 E + where 403 = <Response [403]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_add_and_remove_historia
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_phase4_legado.py:254: in test_add_and_remove_historia assert r.status_code == 200, r.text E AssertionError: {"error":"No autorizado"} E assert 403 == 200 E + where 403 = <Response [403]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_import_valid_gedcom_creates_familiares
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_phase4_legado.py:309: in test_import_valid_gedcom_creates_familiares assert r.status_code == 201, r.text E AssertionError: {"error":"No se encontraron familiares válidos en el archivo GEDCOM"} E assert 400 == 201 E + where 400 = <Response [400]>.status_code
